Event: Cornucopia Island June 2026
Event Date: 08/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AR421
Prism Shard Outfit

Once in a while, the unit casts a plasma shield upon self and the allied unit with the lowest current health. The shield blocks 70% damage of any type and exists up to 5 sec. When an enemy unit deals damage to this shield, they receive 406000 pure damage. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. The damage dealing triggers at most once every 1 sec. When the shield wears off, or is removed, it explodes and starts incinerating 3 random enemy units for 5 sec. The enemy units receive 650000 pure damage every second for 5 sec., and all enemy units in a small radius around the units being incinerated receive pure damage equal to 75% of the damage received by the original targets. Once the incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their maximum health, fortitude, physical and magic armor are reduced by 40% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌝
